summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Sarver Landscape QA system iteration 9 features: PATCH crew-access-links, equipment maintenance submission, equipment logs listing, red-tag notifications, overview rapid-review QR/mobile launch card, crew QR metadata editor, equipment records card, crew capture 3-tab layout with task dropdown, and deployment regression checks. All 23 backend tests passed. All frontend UI tests passed.
test_credentials: Used Owner (owner@fieldquality.local / FieldQA123!), Production Manager (production.manager@fieldquality.local / FieldQA123!), and GM (gm@fieldquality.local / FieldQA123!) from /app/memory/test_credentials.md
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed equipment logs during backend testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 9 validated all requested features: (1) Overview page has Rapid Review mobile launch card with QR code, 'Open mobile link' button, and 'Copy phone link' button, (2) Overview page has Crew QR Updates card allowing any admin role (owner/management) to edit crew metadata (label, truck_number, division, assignment), (3) Overview page has Equipment Records card showing recent maintenance + red-tag records with status badges and red tag notes, (4) PATCH /api/crew-access-links/{id} returns 200 and updated crew link data for both owner and management roles, (5) POST /api/public/equipment-logs creates equipment maintenance records with pre/post photos, general notes, and red-tag notes, (6) GET /api/equipment-logs returns paginated equipment logs for owner and management, (7) POST /api/equipment-logs/{id}/forward-to-owner requires GM title or owner role (PM gets 403), returns {status: 'forwarded'}, (8) Crew capture page has 3-tab layout: Work capture, Standards highlights, Equipment maintenance, (9) Crew capture has task dropdown with division-specific tasks, (10) Equipment maintenance tab has form with equipment number, general note, red-tag note (pink background), pre/post photo uploads, and submit button, (11) Incident/damage reporting toggle works with issue type, notes, and photo fields, (12) Standards Library page loads with authoring UI, search/filter, training session generator, (13) Repeat Offenders page loads with heatmap grid showing crew/issue type cells with level indicators, (14) Rapid Review mobile lane works with swipe HUD guidance, (15) All navigation restrictions work correctly for owner and management roles.
